text: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten.
Hello! I am early for the meeting. I am Dr. Carter, a doctor from the United States.
Welcome, Dr. Carter! My name is Graziele. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too. What is your role here?
I am a nurse. I work at the hospital with the medical groups.
Great! Do you work with many doctors?
Yes. I work with doctors from many teams. I am the coordinator.
Wonderful. Thank you for the welcome.
You are welcome. Please come in. The meeting starts now.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the medical group meeting. Today we talk about the cardiology team and new projects for the hospital. We have a special guest today, a doctor from another country. Please say your name and your role at the start. The meeting is on Zoom, so speak slowly and clearly. Thank you, and welcome.

Hi Graziele, this is a quick message before the meeting. We have a guest today, a doctor from the United States. He is very kind. Please welcome him and say your name and your role. You are the coordinator now, so you start the meeting. Good luck, and see you on Zoom.

Graziele welcomes the guest to the meeting. She says her name and her role. Doctor Carter says he is a doctor from the United States. They talk about the medical group. They say nice to meet you and start the meeting.
Welcome to the meeting, Dr. Carter.
We have a special guest today.
My name is Graziele. I am a nurse.
I work at the hospital with the medical groups.
Nice to meet you. Thank you.
My name is Graziele. Nice to meet you.
I am a nurse. I work at the hospital.
I work with doctors and medical teams.
